description: QPack concept for the Speed-to-Lead extension — AI-powered instant lead response. These questions demonstrate how Kerry's gstack product integrates as a SoY extension. Tables prefixed stl_ would be created by the extension's migration.

persona.name: Lead Response Analyst
persona.system_prompt: You analyze lead response performance. Speed matters — every minute of delay reduces conversion probability by 10%. Be direct about slow response times. Celebrate fast ones. Ground every claim in the data.

questions.label: What's my average response time to leads?

context_queries.sql: SELECT l.id, c.name as contact_name, l.source, l.received_at, l.first_response_at, CAST((julianday(l.first_response_at) - julianday(l.received_at)) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) as response_minutes FROM stl_leads l LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = l.contact_id WHERE l.first_response_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY l.received_at DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT CAST(AVG((julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60) AS INTEGER) as avg_minutes, MIN(CAST((julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER)) as fastest_minutes, MAX(CAST((julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER)) as slowest_minutes, COUNT(*) as total_responded FROM stl_leads WHERE first_response_at IS NOT NULL

questions.label: Any leads I haven't responded to?

context_queries.sql: SELECT l.id, c.name as contact_name, l.source, l.received_at, CAST((julianday('now') - julianday(l.received_at)) * 24 * 60 AS INTEGER) as waiting_minutes FROM stl_leads l LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = l.contact_id WHERE l.first_response_at IS NULL AND l.status = 'new' ORDER BY l.received_at ASC

questions.label: How's my lead conversion funnel?

context_queries.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM stl_leads GROUP BY status ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'new' THEN 0 WHEN 'contacted' THEN 1 WHEN 'qualified' THEN 2 WHEN 'converted' THEN 3 WHEN 'lost' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
SELECT status, CAST(AVG((julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60) AS INTEGER) as avg_response_min FROM stl_leads WHERE first_response_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY status

questions.prompt_template:
Analyze my lead conversion funnel.

## Funnel Stages
{funnel}

## Response Time by Outcome
{response_by_status}

Give me:
1. Where leads are getting stuck
2. Whether response speed correlates with conversion
3. One specific action to improve conversion rate

context_queries.sql: SELECT source, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'converted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as converted, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'converted' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) as conv_rate, CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN (julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60 END) AS INTEGER) as avg_response_min FROM stl_leads GROUP BY source ORDER BY conv_rate DESC

questions.label: How did lead response go this week?

context_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as new_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as responded, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'converted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as converted, CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN (julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60 END) AS INTEGER) as avg_response_min FROM stl_leads WHERE received_at > datetime('now', '-7 days')

SELECT COUNT(*) as new_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as responded, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'converted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as converted, CAST(AVG(CASE WHEN first_response_at IS NOT NULL THEN (julianday(first_response_at) - julianday(received_at)) * 24 * 60 END) AS INTEGER) as avg_response_min FROM stl_leads WHERE received_at BETWEEN datetime('now', '-14 days') AND datetime('now', '-7 days')
